title: Select Curation
description: Choose a curation to add to the weekly schedule
descriptionMulti: Filter by level curation types, then pick one or more curations

filters.facetBuilderTitle: Filter by curation types (simple or advanced)
filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by song, artist, or creator...
filters.mustIncludeHint: Only levels that have every selected type (as curations) are shown.
filters.excludeTypesHint: Hide any level that has at least one curation of these types.
filters.noneSelected: No types required — all levels match

multiSelectHint: Click rows to toggle selection. Use the button below to apply.
creator: Creator
